events.title: Brian May turns 74
events.blurb: Queen guitarist Brian May turns 74 on July 19

angles.name: Queen legend
angles.copy: Brian May, the legendary guitarist of Queen, turns 74, a man who has given us some of the most iconic riffs in rock history

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83

angles.name: rock royalty
angles.copy: The one and only Mick Jagger turns 83, a true rock legend who has been entertaining us for decades

events.title: MTV Launched 47 Years Ago
events.blurb: MTV was launched on August 1, 1981, with the first video being Buggles - Video Killed The Radio Star

angles.name: music revolution
angles.copy: MTV launched 47 years ago, changing the music landscape with its 24-hour music video format

events.title: Oasis Release Definitely Maybe 32 Years Ago

angles.copy: Oasis released their iconic debut album Definitely Maybe 32 years ago, an album that defined a generation of music fans

events.title: Woodstock Festival Took Place 57 Years Ago
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place from August 15 to 18, 1969

angles.name: peace and love
angles.copy: The legendary Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago, a celebration of peace, love, and music that still inspires us today

events.title: Anniversary Of Elvis' Death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away on August 16, 1977

angles.name: king of rock
angles.copy: Today we remember the one and only Elvis Presley, who passed away 49 years ago, leaving behind a legacy of unforgettable music

events.title: Tupac Shakur Shot 30 Years Ago

angles.copy: Tupac Shakur was shot 30 years ago, a tragic event that shocked the music world and left a lasting impact on hip hop

events.title: Anniversary Of Jimi Hendrix' Death
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 2, 1970

angles.name: guitar legend
angles.copy: Jimi Hendrix, one of the most influential guitarists in history, passed away 56 years ago, leaving behind a legacy of innovative music

events.title: The Beatles Release Abbey Road 57 Years Ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album Abbey Road on September 4, 1969

angles.name: beatles classics

events.title: James Bond Day
